creator: mjg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for finding the fixing change.

I merged it to stable/13: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/src/commit/?id=ca63cbbe95540bfcac3f6020ded5b5ed6522c6a2

tmpfs already did not have the problem and while untested, does not look like zfs has it either.

As such I'm closing this PR.
